description: The Vermont LEPC has flagged two facilities in their Tier II database for missing required emergency contacts. Import the Tier II data file at C:\workspace\data\central_vt_facilities.xml into CAMEO Data Manager. For Montpelier Industrial Supply, add Robert Flanagan (title: 'Emergency Response Coordinator', phone: 802-555-0219) with the contact type 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator'. For Richmond Processing Plant, add Maria Santos (title: 'Plant Safety Officer', phone: 802-555-0347) with the contact types 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator' and 'Emergency Contact'. Export the updated Tier II dataset as XML to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\contacts_updated.xml.
